data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 6
data.detailed_description:
The day after Yuna dominated you in your dorm room while Kirita watched, you and Yuna have another femdom session after your university classes are done, and of course, Kirita wants to watch but is a bit worried about Hinata, one of your classmates who has been looking a bit depressed recently. As usual, Yuna dominates you, but just like Kirita, she's a bit worried about Hinata, but for now, she's focusing on relieving her own sadistic urges on you.

Experience another day of being dominated by Yuna, your giant, sadistic, tanned sensei, while Kirita, your voyeur classmate, gets off on watching you get bullied.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 17 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
